MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Luis Molina, 415.647.6003 for Plantiff Lidia Diaz. (In person)
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PRISCELLA BUGARIN MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is denied. Assuming without deciding that service of summons and complaint were made by means of a trespass, which is the sole argument asserted for this motion, the moving party cites no authority, nor is the court aware of any, that service accomplished by trespass invalidates the service. The moving party must file an answer or other response to the complaint within ten calendar days. Order signed. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
